name: cell-architecture
description: >- Reference and active migration guide for Sentry's cell architecture. Explains what cells and localities are and why they're different, how requests reach cells via Synapse API routing, ingestion routing, and the control silo gateway, and how to safely query cross-cell data without silently missing results. The migration section covers how to do migration work: draining the URL_NAME_TO_ACTION registry in test_urls.py to zero (with a recipe for each action type), rolling deploy safety and the t
author: getsentry
